questions.question: Design a MapReduce program to find the tags associated with each movie in the movie lens data. What are the key components of the MapReduce program and how do they contribute to the overall functionality?
questions.hint: Focus on the logical structure and key components of the MapReduce program

questions.question: Explain how you would handle the case where a movie has multiple tags (i.e., a movie can have multiple genres), and how this would affect the output of the MapReduce program. Provide an example of how the output would look for such a movie.
questions.hint: Focus on the handling of multiple tags and the impact on the output

questions.question: Describe the importance of proper data handling and transformation in the MapReduce program. What steps would you take to ensure that the movie lens data is properly filtered, cleaned, and transformed before being processed by the MapReduce program?
questions.hint: Focus on the data handling and transformation steps
